hero.title: Embrace Open Source, Control the Future
hero.subtitle: MuiStory is fully open source. We believe in the power of openness and invite you to build the future of interactive storytelling together.

control.title: Full Control
control.description: The code is in your hands, the data is in your hands. No black boxes, no lock-in.

customize.title: Defined by You
customize.description: Want special features? Implement them yourself. Or tell us, and we'll build it together.

community.title: Community Driven
community.description: Join a passionate developer community, share experiences, and grow together.

cost.title: Transparent Costs
cost.description: Connect directly with AI providers, no middleman markups.

successCases.title: Success Cases
successCases.description: See how others are using MuiStory to create amazing stories.

xiaoniao.title: Xiao Niao Shuo
xiaoniao.description: An interactive story park designed for children, built with MuiStory, allowing kids to learn and grow through fun story adventures.

deployment.title: Easy Deployment
deployment.description: Built on Next.js and Cloudflare full-stack architecture, deployment is simple and cost-effective.

steps.2: Configure Cloudflare and AI API Keys

support.title: We've Got Your Back
support.content: Worried about AI Providers? Don't know how to configure the environment? Don't worry, we promise to help everyone who wants to try self-hosting.

hero.title: Everyone Can Create Interactive Fiction
hero.subtitle: Write stories in Markdown, let AI polish your prose, add branching choices and interactive elements, publish to multiple platforms.

features.title: Everything You Need to Create
features.subtitle: An all-in-one platform built for interactive fiction authors

editor.title: An Editor Built for Stories
editor.description: Auto-save, smart suggestions, scene management, character definitions — designed for interactive fiction, with a smooth writing experience.

aiAssistant.title: AI Deeply Integrated
aiAssistant.description: Polish prose, improve dialogue, check plot consistency, generate illustrations and sound effects. AI is always ready — you stay in control.

interactive.title: Rich Interactive System
interactive.description: Branching choices, variable system, conditional text, embedded mini games — let readers become part of the story.

publish.title: Multi-Platform Publishing
publish.description: One-click publish to Web. Coming soon: export to Ren'Py scripts or desktop apps for Steam and more.

focus.title: Focus on Your Story, We Handle the Rest
focus.description: No need to learn complex programming languages. Just write your story, and AI will turn it into an engaging interactive novel. Markdown syntax is simple and intuitive — you'll get started in minutes.

aiMedia.title: AI Generates Images, Video & Audio
aiMedia.description: Before you find professional artists and sound designers, AI can fill the gaps — generating scene illustrations, background music, and character voices. You don't have to use it, but it's there when you need it.

templates.title: Multiple Game Templates, Ready to Use
templates.description: Support for various interactive fiction templates and gameplay styles, with new templates added based on creator needs. Your creativity shouldn't be limited by tools.

private.title: Private Publishing, for Those Who Care
private.description: Support password protection and private publishing. Share your work only with those who truly appreciate it, or let friends test before going public.

export.title: Coming Soon: One-Click Export to Steam
export.description: We're developing one-click conversion to Ren'Py and Godot formats, packaging as desktop apps for Steam, itch.io and more. Iterate quickly here, then export when you're satisfied.

openDev.title: Actively Developed, We Listen
openDev.description: This project is under active development, and we truly value every creator's feedback. Share your ideas and suggestions — they might make it into the next release.

workflow.title: Start Creating in Three Steps
workflow.subtitle: From inspiration to publication, it's all simple

step1.title: Write Your Story
step1.description: Write with the Markdown editor. AI assistant helps you polish and improve anytime.

step2.title: Add Interactive Elements
step2.description: Add branching choices, variables, images, sound effects, and mini games to bring your story to life.

step3.title: Publish with One Click
step3.description: Share on the Web with readers, or export to other platforms for distribution.

blog.title: Latest Updates
blog.subtitle: Product updates, tutorials, and industry insights

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Everything you want to know about MuiStory

whatIs.question: What is MuiStory?
whatIs.answer: MuiStory is an interactive fiction creation platform. Write interactive stories with a Markdown editor, add branching choices, variables, and multimedia elements, then publish for readers to experience. The AI writing assistant helps improve your prose and check plot consistency.

howCreate.question: How do I create my own story?
howCreate.answer: After registering, go to the dashboard and click 'Create Game'. Use the editor to write scene content, add choices to connect different scenes, and set variables and conditions for branching narratives. The AI assistant can help polish your text and optimize the plot.

pricing.question: Is it free to use?
pricing.answer: Core creation features are free. The AI writing assistant provides a free daily quota. If you need more, you can purchase additional usage or use your own AI API keys.

export.question: Can I export to other platforms?
export.answer: Currently you can publish to the Web. We're developing Ren'Py script export and desktop app packaging, so you'll be able to publish to Steam, itch.io, and more.

aiRole.question: What role does AI play in creation?
aiRole.answer: AI is your writing assistant, not your replacement. It can help polish prose, improve dialogue quality, check plot consistency, and generate images and sound effects. The story's creativity and direction are always in your hands.

cta.title: Start Your Story
cta.subtitle: Join the creator community and connect the world through stories.

about.pageDescription: Learn about MuiStory's core features, technical architecture, and vision
about.heroSubtitle: An AI-powered interactive story creation platform, empowering everyone to become storytellers
about.missionContent: We believe everyone has a story to tell. MuiStory uses AI technology to lower the barrier to creating interactive fiction and text adventure games, so creativity is no longer limited by technical skills. Our goal is to let authors control AI, rather than be controlled by it, ensuring story quality and gameplay.
about.featuresSubtitle: Powerful AI tools make storytelling simple and fun

aiAssist.title: AI-Assisted Creation
aiAssist.description: Zero coding required. Describe your ideas in natural language, and AI generates complete scripts. Import story outlines and generate branching narratives with one click.

aiChatbot.title: 24/7 AI Chatbot Assistant
aiChatbot.description: Always-available smart assistant to answer questions, optimize plots, and refine details. As simple as talking to a professional screenwriter.

variables.title: Variable System, Infinite Possibilities
variables.description: Use variables to change story paths based on player choices. Supports affection, items, attributes, and more.

minigames.title: Scene Mini Games
minigames.description: AI automatically generates interactive mini-games like puzzles and combat. Stories become not just readable, but playable.

richInteractive.title: Rich Multimedia
richInteractive.description: Support AI-generated images, voice, and other multimedia content for immersive reading experiences.

crossPlatform.title: Cross-Platform Publishing
crossPlatform.description: One-click publish to Web with responsive design for all devices. Easy sharing with friends.

about.aiSectionContent1: Our AI assistant can not only generate scripts but also understand your creative intent. Through natural language conversation, you can adjust story direction, optimize dialogue, and add interactive elements anytime.
about.aiSectionContent2: Supports multiple AI models including GPT-4 and Gemini to ensure creative quality. Built-in prompt templates help AI better understand interactive storytelling.
about.editorSectionContent1: Intuitive node-based editor lets you build stories like building blocks. Drag and connect to create branching narratives, what you see is what you get.
about.editorSectionContent2: Supports multi-scene management, character systems, variable editing, and other advanced features. Even complex multi-branch stories are easy to handle.

parser.title: DSL Parser
parser.description: Custom story scripting language supporting variables, conditions, loops, and more. TypeScript implementation, type-safe.

assetGenerator.title: Asset Generator
assetGenerator.description: Integrated with multiple AI image generation services, supporting batch generation and cache optimization. Auto compression and CDN distribution.

cloudflare.title: Edge Deployment
cloudflare.description: Built on Cloudflare Workers and D1 database, global edge deployment with millisecond response times.

about.platformSectionContent1: Responsive design ensures perfect experience on phones, tablets, and computers. PWA support lets you use it like a native app.
about.platformSectionContent2: Cloud-stored game progress, seamless cross-device continuation. Share links to let friends experience your creations.
about.ctaContent: Whether you want to experience amazing interactive stories or create your own adventures, MuiStory is here for you.

contact.ctaContent: Whether you want to play or create, MuiStory welcomes you.
